title: [MTR4] TfW Mark 4 Set
description: Resource pack that adds BR Intercity 225 sets (Transport for Wales livery) into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This is a Transport for Wales livery addon created for the [MTR3/4] BR InterCity 225 Set created by Vitor2005. This resource pack will not function standalone without installing the aforementioned pack.

This pack can only be used in MTR4. MTR3 was not tested.

> Link to the original pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr3-br-intercity-225-set
> 
> Link to Class 67 (recommended to use): https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4-british-rail-class-67
## Transport for Wales formation
The Mark 4 / InterCity 225 set used in Transport for Wales are formed as below:
> DVT | Coach A (SO) | Coach B (FOD) | Coach C (RSB) | Coach D (SOD) | Coach E (SOE) | Class 67

In this pack, all 5 coaches are listed as independent cars along with the DVT, in the correct order.

DVT 82216 is included in the pack which forms set HD03 (ex-LNER) at the time of uploading.
## Edits from the original pack
- Transport for Wales logo, Wales and Borders branding and TfW website text added on all coaches.
- Coach D has been copied and flipped as Coach A. This is done due to their different wave direction.
- Coach C has been flipped. This is done to reflect the real wave direction.
- Mapping on Coach B has been fixed. This is done to show the (1) Cyntaf/First on the doors.
## Known inaccuracies
- The RSB Car (Coach C) has 1st Class seats instead of the standard class in real life. This is unchanged from the original IC225 pack.
- Unit numbers are not added for the Mk4 coaches.
## Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, British Rail, Transport for Wales, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315.
